title: Adobe Experience Cloud Journey
description: A customer journey definition in Adobe Journey Optimizer representing an orchestrated sequence of actions, conditions, and wait steps that guide individual profiles through personalized multi-channel experiences.

journeyId.description: The unique identifier for the journey.

name.description: The human-readable name of the journey.

description.description: A description of the journey purpose and flow.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the journey.

version.description: The version identifier of the journey.

entryCondition.description: The conditions under which profiles enter the journey.

segmentId.description: The segment ID for segment-based entry.

eventId.description: The event ID for event-based entry.

activities.description: The ordered list of activities in the journey.

activityId.description: Unique identifier for this activity step.

name.description: A label for this activity step.

nextActivityId.description: The ID of the next activity in the flow.

totalEntered.description: Total profiles that have entered the journey.

currentlyInJourney.description: Profiles currently progressing through the journey.

totalExited.description: Profiles that have completed or exited the journey.

lastModified.description: When the journey was last modified.

publishedAt.description: When the journey was last published.
